manaflow-ai/cmux ·GitHub ⭐ 5690 Swift · Terminal, AI Coding, Developer Tools, macOS, Productivity, Open Source

What it is

cmux is a native macOS terminal optimized for parallel AI coding sessions. It features vertical tabs, notification rings that alert you when an agent needs attention, and a scriptable in-app browser for direct agent interaction.

Problems solved

  • Managing multiple concurrent AI coding sessions (Claude Code, etc.)
  • Missed notifications from background agents
  • Heavy memory usage of Electron-based orchestrators

How to get started

Install via DMG or Homebrew. Use the sidebar to manage workspaces and monitor git status. Use cmux notify in your agent hooks to trigger visual alerts when input is required.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

manaflow-ai/cmux is positioned as a cmux is a native macos terminal optimized for parallel ai coding sessions. it features vertical tabs, notification rings that alert you when an agent needs attention, and a scriptable in-app browser for direct agent interaction. It aims to provide developers with a robust, Swift-based solution for ghostty-based macos terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for ai coding agents.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Managing multiple concurrent AI coding sessions (Claude Code, etc.). manaflow-ai/cmux addresses this by cmux is a native macos terminal optimized for parallel ai coding sessions. it features vertical tabs, notification rings that alert you when an agent needs attention, and a scriptable in-app browser for direct agent interaction, offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using Swift, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

4. Core Implementation

Main logic revolves around ghostty-based macos terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for ai coding agents. The implementation utilizes Swift's strengths to provide cmux is a native macos terminal optimized for parallel ai coding sessions. it features vertical tabs, notification rings that alert you when an agent needs attention, and a scriptable in-app browser for direct agent interaction, ensuring high reliability and performance under load.

5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, install via dmg or homebrew. use the sidebar to manage workspaces and monitor git status. use cmux notify in your agent hooks to trigger visual alerts when input is required. This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.

7. Summary

An essential, Swift-powered utility that streamlines ghostty-based macos terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for ai coding agents; it effectively tackles Managing multiple concurrent AI coding sessions (Claude Code, etc.) while maintaining a high standard of code quality and usability.
